name: Sony Alpha a7 III Mirrorless Camera
description: Advanced 24.2MP BSI Full-frame Image Sensor w/ 1.8X readout speed. 15-stop dynamic range, 14-bit uncompressed RAW.

name: Apple MacBook Pro 16"
description: Apple M2 Pro or M2 Max chip for a massive leap in CPU, GPU, and machine learning performance. Up to 22 hours of battery life.

name: Minimalist Ceramic Coffee Mug
description: Hand-crafted ceramic mug with a matte finish. Perfect for your morning coffee or evening tea.

name: Premium Leather Weekend Bag
description: Spacious duffel bag made from genuine full-grain leather. Features multiple interior pockets.

name: Bose QuietComfort 45
description: Iconic quiet. Comfort. And sound. The first noise cancelling headphones are back, with world-class quiet.

name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Ultra-soft, breathable organic cotton t-shirt. Ethically made and designed for everyday comfort.

name: Smart Home Hub Controller
description: Control your entire home with this intuitive touchscreen hub. Compatible with over 10,000 smart devices.

name: Luxury Scented Soy Candle
description: A deeply relaxing blend of lavender, vanilla, and cedarwood. Hand-poured soy wax with 60hr burn time.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Designed for long hours of comfortable sitting. Features adjustable lumbar support, armrests, and headrest.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile switches for satisfying feedback and rapid response.

name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: Timeless aviator design featuring polarized lenses and a lightweight metal frame.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Keep your drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. Double-wall vacuum insulation.
